title: Ducks x Bare Bones
description: This texture pack replaces Chicken with Ducks in the Bare Bones style!
body:
This texture pack replaces Chickens and turns them into Ducks!﻿

**-Changes Chicken items to Duck

-New Spawn Egg texture

-New Sounds for the Duck

-Custom Baby Duckling Model

This pack REQUIRES EMF, ETF + ESF

﻿OR OPTIFINE
